description: Long-term episodic memory for OpenClaw agents. Automatically saves conversation episodes, retrieves relevant past memories via semantic search, and injects them into every prompt — now with topics-aware recall, Bayesian rerank, and replay scheduling.

GEMINI_API_KEY.description: Gemini API key used by the Go sidecar to embed conversation episodes via the Gemini Embedding API. This key must already be present in your OpenClaw environment — the plugin reads it from the environment and never stores it.

enabled.description: Enable or disable the plugin (default true).

reserveTokens.description: Max tokens reserved for injected episode memories in the system prompt (default 6144).

recentKeep.description: Number of recent turns to retain during compaction (default 30).

dedupWindow.description: Duplicate-message dedup window size (default 5). Increase to 10+ in high-fallback environments.

maxBufferChars.description: Character threshold that triggers a forced buffer flush regardless of surprise score (default 7200). Must be >= 500.

maxCharsPerChunk.description: Max characters per chunk sent to batchIngest (default 9000). Setting this below maxBufferChars splits one flush into multiple episodes. Must be >= 500.

segmentationLambda.description: Adaptive segmentation: threshold = mean + lambda * std.

segmentationWarmupCount.description: Adaptive segmentation: number of observations needed before dynamic scoring.

segmentationMinRawSurprise.description: Adaptive segmentation: raw surprise floor below which boundaries are not cut.

segmentationCooldownTurns.description: Adaptive segmentation: cooldown turns after a detected boundary.

segmentationStdFloor.description: Adaptive segmentation: minimum std floor to avoid over-sensitive scoring.

segmentationFallbackThreshold.description: Adaptive segmentation: fixed threshold used during fallback or warmup.

recallSemanticFloor.description: Recall calibration: semantic relevance below this floor should not be overruled by usefulness/replay.

recallUsefulnessClamp.description: Recall calibration: cap usefulness posterior contribution so it stays a correction term.

recallReplayTieBreakMaxBoost.description: Recall calibration: maximum replay-state tie-break boost.

recallReplayLowRetrievabilityBonus.description: Recall calibration: tiny extra boost when a replay candidate is clearly getting stale.

recallTopicsMatchBoost.description: Recall calibration: bonus per matched topic.

recallTopicsMismatchPenalty.description: Recall calibration: penalty when topics exist but none match.

recallTopicsMissingPenalty.description: Recall calibration: penalty when the record has no topics at all. Usually zero.

sharedEpisodesDir.description: (Planned — Phase 6) Path to a shared episodes directory across multiple agents. Has no effect in current version.

allowCrossAgentRecall.description: (Planned — Phase 6) Whether to include other agents' episodes in recall results. Has no effect in current version.
